assumptions.statement: AI data center operators continue seeking long-duration clean power contracts.
Oklo can preserve financing flexibility through the next licensing milestones.

views.thesis: Firm clean power scarcity could support premium economics if Oklo converts interest into binding contracts.

views.target: no target until licensing timeline is dated
views.thesis: Commercial upside remains hard to underwrite before licensing cadence and financing runway are clearer.

catalyst_checklist.title: Material licensing update with a clear review timeline.
Signed commercial power purchase agreement with credible counterparty.
Capital raise or partnership that reduces funding risk.

open_checklist.item: Confirm latest cash balance and expected burn.
Map each announced customer to binding contract evidence.

open_position_rules.rule: Keep status at watchlist until a dated licensing update is source-backed.
Do not size from AI power narrative without named contract evidence.

positions: Watchlist only until milestone evidence improves.
No thesis action without updated cash runway and licensing review.

high_risks.mitigation: Require dated regulatory milestones before increasing conviction.
high_risks.name: Licensing delay

latest_review.drift: Catalyst tracking added so future reviews separate power-demand validation from Oklo-specific execution evidence.
latest_review.summary: Maintain watchlist status until catalysts move from narrative support to dated, source-backed milestones.

questions_before_action.question: Does the latest review decision still support the contemplated action?
Are all high-severity risks understood with current mitigation evidence?
Have open catalysts been checked for new source-backed status changes?
Do open position rules permit the proposed exposure?
Are stale, unused, or unsupported evidence gaps acceptable before action?
What evidence would falsify the action after execution?

thesis: Advanced nuclear developers may benefit if AI data center demand increases the value of firm, clean power, but commercialization timing and regulatory execution remain the core constraints.
title: Oklo AI Power Demand Thesis
